allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/authenticate" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"ping","password":"ping"}' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "LOCALHOST OK status=$\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "LOCALHOST FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" ; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { Write-Output "LOCALHOST HTTP STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" } }; Write-Output "---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-Command','New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "Spring Boot 8080 \(BookTracker dev\)" -Direction Inbound -Action Allow -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 8080 -Profile Any | Out-Null; Write-Host "Firewall rule added. Closing in 3 seconds..."; Start-Sleep 3')

PowerShell($email = "diagnostic_test_$\(Get-Random\)@test.local"; Write-Output "=== REGISTER \(new email: $email\) ==="; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.1.137:8080/api/v1/auth/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body "{`"email`":`"$email`",`"password`":`"pass123`"}" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "BODY: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { Write-Output "HTTP STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; try { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); Write-Output "BODY: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } catch {} } })
